title: rhinerrhiza moorei
intro: Rhinerrhiza moorei, also known as the "Sea Rhubarb", is a type of plant found in coastal areas of New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhinerrhiza moorei include the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Rhinerrhiza moorei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine as a poultice to treat wounds and skin irritations.
